item.title: Evolve rollback + credentials.json + posture.yaml
item.intent: Separate credentials into credentials.json (mode 0600), expose security posture in posture.yaml, and ensure every capability change has a rollback snapshot.
item.description: SECURITY MATURITY: credentials.json separation from .env is the difference between 'works' and 'production-grade'. Integration credentials in a dedicated store (mode 0600) means rotate one integration without touching others. Security posture YAML makes the container hardening visible and reviewable — the Tinkerer persona wants to see what posture they're running. Rollback snapshots for all capability changes complete the safety story started in CQ-021. Acceptance: credentials.json separate from .env; posture.yaml reflects active security settings; rollback restores previous capability state.
steps: Separate credentials into credentials.json with mode 0600
Create posture.yaml reflecting active security settings
Implement rollback snapshots for all capability changes
acceptanceCriteria: posture.yaml reflects active security settings and is human-reviewable
Rollback restores previous capability state cleanly
